---
title: "tensor_product_basis"
generated: true
description: "Build an anisotropic tensor-product interaction smooth from marginals."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.basis`](../nitrix-stats-basis.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:tensor_product_basis -->
```python
tensor_product_basis(margins: Tuple[SplineBasis, ...], *, eig_rtol: float = 1e-10) -> TensorBasis
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:tensor_product_basis -->
Build an anisotropic tensor-product interaction smooth from marginals.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:tensor_product_basis -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `margins` | `Tuple[SplineBasis, ...]` | — | — | Two or more [`SplineBasis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/SplineBasis.qmd) on the **matched** covariates (same number of rows `n`), each typically sum-to-zero constrained (`center=True`). Mixed kinds are allowed (e.g. a P-spline crossed with a cyclic margin). |
| `eig_rtol` | `float` | — | `1e-10` | Relative tolerance below which a marginal-penalty eigenvalue is floored to exact zero (its unpenalised null space), so the smoothing-parameter trace counts the correct penalty rank. |

**Returns** `TensorBasis`. The [`TensorBasis`](../nitrix-stats-basis/TensorBasis.qmd) with the `(n, prod_j k_j)` design and the per-margin penalties.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
